GT LEARN #452 🎈 Minimum Number of Arrows to Burst Balloons MEDIUM Greedy Sorting
points= exp: 2

📝 Problem Statement

Diye gaye balloons hain — har balloon ek interval [xstart, xend] hai (horizontal axis pe). Ek arrow jo x position se vertically shoot hota hai, woh saare balloons burst kar deta hai jinka range x ko cover karta hai (i.e., xstart ≤ x ≤ xend). Minimum kitne arrows chahiye saare balloons phodne ke liye?

🧠 Solving Approach (Greedy)

Balloons ko end-coordinate ke hisaab se sort karo. Pehla arrow uthao us balloon ke end par. Jitne balloons us end ko cover karte hain — sab burst! Jab koi balloon aaye jiska start > end ho — naya arrow chahiye, naya end set karo.

🎯 Core Concepts

Greedy Choice: End-coordinate ke hisaab se sort karke earliest end pe arrow daalo — yeh maximum overlap cover karta hai.
Decision rule: Agar current balloon ka start > current end → naya arrow chahiye. Warna purana arrow hi kaam karega.
Correctness: Earliest end pe arrow rakhna optimal hai kyunki yeh future balloons ke saath maximum overlap chance deta hai.
⏱ O(n log n) 💾 O(1) extra

🧪 Test Cases (click to load)

T1Mixed overlap→ 2
[10,16][2,8][1,6][7,12]
T2All disjoint→ 4
[1,2][3,4][5,6][7,8]
T3Touching ends→ 2
[1,2][2,3][3,4][4,5]
T4Heavy overlap→ 2
[3,9][7,12][3,8][6,8][9,10]
T5Single balloon→ 1
[1,5]
Output: —
📜 Python Code
0/0
←→ 100%
